untranslatable_reason: This signal describes a multi-leg options strategy (short stock + long calls at two strikes) which cannot be fully expressed using only price-based indicators and single-leg entry/exit conditions. The strategy requires: (1) identification of strike prices and option chain data (not available in indicator set), (2) simultaneous execution of three separate positions (short equity + 2 long calls), and (3) profit target/position sizing logic tied to option premium levels (AUTHOR_SILENT). Translated entry conditions approximate 'between two price levels' using pivot support/resistance, but the complete options structure is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Approximated 'between two striking prices' using pivot points (s1=support, r1=resistance). Stop loss set to middle of 20-30% range from source text. Exit condition uses bullish reversal above upper strike proxy (r1). The core multi-leg options mechanics cannot be represented without access to options chain indicators and multi-position execution logic.
